title: Overview of Haryana Polytechnic Admission 2026-27

detail.title: Overview of Haryana Polytechnic Admission 2026-27
detail.short_info: Haryana Polytechnic Admission 2026-27: Check Important Dates and Eligibility Criteria

content.text: Haryana Polytechnic Admission 2026-27 application registration has officially started from 21 April 2026 for Diploma Engineering, Lateral Entry, and Pharmacy courses. Conducted by the Haryana State Technical Education Society (HSTES), admissions are merit-based (no entrance exam) through online off-campus counselling on the basis of 10th or 12th marks. Eligible candidates can register online at the official portal techadmissionshry.gov.in. This complete guide covers important dates, eligibility, fees, application process, and direct links so you can apply without missing any deadline.
Official Notification PDF for Haryana Polytechnic Admission: CLICK HERE

rows: Diploma Engineering (3 years), Lateral Entry (2 years), Diploma Pharmacy

content.text: Apply Online – Direct link to official portal.

sections.heading: Haryana Polytechnic Diploma Engineering Important Dates 2026-27
Haryana Polytechnic Diploma Engineering Lateral Entry Important Dates 2026-27
Haryana Polytechnic Diploma Pharmacy Important Dates 2026-27

rows: Passed 10th / SSC from any recognized board
10+2 with Physics, Maths/Chemistry/Computer Science/Electronics/IT/Biology/Technical Vocational subject OR 10th + 2-year ITI
10+2 with Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics/Biology (as per PCI norms)

content.text: Note: PPP ID is mandatory for Haryana residents. Category, income, and disability details are auto-fetched from verified PPP ID.
Payment mode: Online (Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking / UPI).

sections.heading: How to Apply for Haryana Polytechnic Admission 2026-27

items: Visit the official portal → Apply Online.
Register using valid email and mobile number.
Fill the online application form with personal, academic, and category details (PPP ID mandatory for Haryana candidates).
Upload scanned documents (PDF, max 100 KB each).
Submit and take printout of the confirmation page.
Visit designated verification centre (if required) for document check.

sections.heading: Documents Required for Haryana Polytechnic Admission 2026-27
